title: Commercial Executive (Beauty MNC/ 6 months/ No exp ok!)
description:
The Opportunity

  • Opportunity to work a Retail MNC environment specializing in Beauty MNC supporting the Travel Retail Business 
  • Global leader in the industry
  • Salary: $4200
  • Location: Central
  • 6 months contract! 

The Talent: 

  • Min Diploma in Business
  • Passionate about the retail industry, has business acumen
  • Solid analytical skills, number sensitive, detail oriented and organized
  • Effective in communication, excellent interpersonal skills
  • Skillful in project management and advanced in excel skills

Job Description

  • Follow-up on purchase orders and secure orders from clients
  • Manage product and marketing related enquiries from clients
  • Coordinate animations, target sampling and promotional activities efficiently
  • Coordinate with Field Staff and liaise Retail Managers with internal contacts for action Interact effectively with internal other departments (Marketing, Logistics, Finance department, etc.)
  • Assist the team with daily administration, operations and travel arrangement
  • Prepare analysis reports on sales, promotional activities and others

Next Step

  • Simply click on 'Apply here' to drop your resume and contact us to follow-up, or send your resume to amelia.lau@adecco.com!
  • All shortlisted candidates will be contacted.


Amelia Lau An Qi

Direct Line: +65 6697 7987
EA License No: 91C2918
Personnel Registration Number: R1987023

postedCompany.description:
The Adecco Group is the world's leading provider of HR solutions. With over 35,000 FTE employees and over 5,200 branches, in over 60 countries and territories around the world, we offer a wide variety of services, connecting more than 650,000 associates with over 100,000 clients every day.

The services we offer fall into the broad categories of temporary staffing, permanent placement, career transition and talent development, as well as outsourcing and consulting. The Adecco Group is based in Zurich-Glattbrugg, Switzerland and we are a Fortune Global 500 company listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange.
postedCompany.name: ADECCO PERSONNEL PTE LTD
